home.bio: I build modern web applications focused on clean interfaces and quality code. I work with React, TypeScript, and Node.js building everything from e-commerces to community platforms.
home.studyingValue: Software Engineering Degree — UTN (Universidad Tecnológica Nacional)

about.webDevDesc1: I build web applications with React, TypeScript, and Node.js. I focus on clean interfaces, maintainable code, and intuitive user experiences. I work on both frontend and backend, creating complete products from scratch.
about.projectEspacioVina: A wine e-commerce built with PHP featuring an admin dashboard, product catalog, and full management system.
about.projectMigaClub: A landing page for a music club with an admin dashboard, built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
about.projectLaBasica: A pastry shop with shopping cart and admin dashboard, built with React and TypeScript.
about.projectPortfolio: This site, built with React, TypeScript, and Vite. Design inspired by minimalist aesthetics.
about.techFrontend: Frontend: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS
about.techTools: Tools: Git, GitHub, Vite, VS Code, Vercel, Figma
about.techDesign: Design: Responsive design, web accessibility, UI/UX
about.educationUTN: Software Engineering Degree — UTN (Universidad Tecnológica Nacional), in progress
about.educationSelfTaught: Self-taught web developer with real-world client projects
about.shortBio1: Franco Kaddour is a web developer from Buenos Aires, Argentina. He builds web applications with React, TypeScript, and Node.js, focusing on clean interfaces and quality user experiences.
about.shortBio2: He is currently studying Software Engineering at UTN while working on real projects like Espacio Viña, Miga Club, and La Básica.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: This list contains the projects I have worked on. Each one represents a different challenge and learning opportunity.
projects.espacioVinaDesc: Espacio Viña is a wine e-commerce built with PHP featuring a complete admin dashboard. It includes a product catalog, order management, and an administration panel for the business.
projects.migaClubDesc: Miga Club is a landing page for a music club with an admin dashboard. Built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, featuring responsive design and animations.
projects.laBasicaDesc: La Básica is an online pastry shop with a shopping cart and admin dashboard. Built with React and TypeScript, featuring a modern and fluid UI.
projects.portfolioDesc: This personal portfolio, built with React, TypeScript, and Vite. Minimalist design inspired by benobi.one aesthetics with multilanguage support.
projects.monitoreoDesc: An environmental monitoring project built with Python for UTN. A system for collecting and visualizing environmental data.
